style_lock: Editorial collage illustration in watercolor style. A clean, singular focal point on a full-frame background of aged beige parchment paper. The background is a solid, sand-colored antique paper with amber stains and natural grain, slightly darker at edges. Key visual hook: a thin, vibrant red hand-drawn ink line that interacts with the main subject. Elements include: 1-2 vintage postage stamps, one red wax seal, and a bold label in heavy vintage serif font on a torn paper strip. Palette: rich honey gold, deep amber, sepia, and a single sharp pop of vibrant red ink. Minimalist composition, sharp focus, 100% paper texture coverage, no white areas.
